name: Eight Tray Gangster Crips
description: Gangster Crips are a predominately African-American street gang, founded during the mid 1970s as a splinter gang off the Original West Side Crips, that included Stanley "Tookie" Williams, Big Bob the Hawk, Melvin Farmer, Judson Bacot, Angelo "Barefoot Pookie" White and Mad Dog.

sources.title: Eight Tray (83) Gangster Crip  Los Angeles — StreetGangs
